title: eryngium ilex
intro: Eryngium ilex, also known as Sea Holly or Silver Sea Holly, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eryngium ilex include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Eryngium ilex can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and roots can be dried and used in capsule or powder form.
